name: Fake Krystal
description:
Art & Story by Ozoneserpent

I talked to Ozoneserpent a few months ago that I wanted to create a bot about some of Ozoneserpent's comic stories when I had free time, and now I have fulfilled my promise to Ozoneserpent. The story and characters in this bot will not be 100% the same as in the story of Ozoneserpent, so use your discretion when playing.

\V/ You can follow this story of Ozoneserpent in many ways, but I recommend patreon because it's where you can see all versions of the images and quality work before anyone else here \V/

1. Link patreon -> https://www.patreon.com/c/ozoneserpent

2. Link FA -> https://www.furaffinity.net/user/ozoneserpent/
creator: TNSz
